mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_POST(ID, POST_TITLE, POST_CONTENT, MEMBER_ID) VALUES (SEQ_POST.NEXTVAL, #{postTitle}, #{postContent}, #{memberId})
mapper.select: SELECT TBP.ID, TBP.POST_TITLE, TBP.POST_CONTENT, TBP.POST_READ_COUNT, TBM.MEMBER_NAME, TBM.MEMBER_EMAIL FROM TBL_POST TBP JOIN TBL_MEMBER TBM ON TBP.MEMBER_ID = TBM.ID
SELECT TBP.ID, TBP.POST_TITLE, TBP.POST_CONTENT, TBP.POST_READ_COUNT, TBM.MEMBER_NAME FROM TBL_POST TBP JOIN TBL_MEMBER TBM ON TBP.MEMBER_ID = TBM.ID WHERE TBP.ID = #{id}

SELECT COUNT(*) TOTAL_POST_COUNT, COUNT(*) / #{limit} TOTAL_PAGE_COUNT FROM ( SELECT TBP.ID, TBP.POST_TITLE, TBP.POST_CONTENT, TBP.POST_READ_COUNT, TBP.MEMBER_ID, TBM.MEMBER_EMAIL, TBM.MEMBER_NAME FROM TBL_POST TBP JOIN TBL_MEMBER TBM ON TBP.MEMBER_ID = TBM.ID
WHERE POST_TITLE LIKE #{keyword}
OR POST_CONTENT LIKE #{keyword} ORDER BY
POST_READ_COUNT DESC
ID DESC
OFFSET (#{cursor} - 1) * #{limit} ROWS FETCH FIRST #{limit} ROWS ONLY )

SELECT TBP.ID, TBP.POST_TITLE, TBP.POST_CONTENT, TBP.POST_READ_COUNT, TBP.MEMBER_ID, TBM.MEMBER_EMAIL, TBM.MEMBER_NAME FROM TBL_POST TBP JOIN TBL_MEMBER TBM ON TBP.MEMBER_ID = TBM.ID
WHERE POST_TITLE LIKE #{keyword} OR POST_CONTENT LIKE #{keyword}

SELECT TBP.ID, TBP.POST_TITLE, TBP.POST_CONTENT, TBP.POST_READ_COUNT, TBP.MEMBER_ID, TBM.MEMBER_EMAIL, TBM.MEMBER_NAME FROM TBL_POST TBP JOIN TBL_MEMBER TBM ON TBP.MEMBER_ID = TBM.ID
WHERE POST_TITLE LIKE #{keyword} OR POST_CONTENT LIKE #{keyword}
ORDER BY
POST_READ_COUNT DESC
ID DESC
OFFSET (#{cursor} - 1) * #{limit} ROWS FETCH FIRST #{limit} ROWS ONLY
